name: Summit Golf Training
about: Summit Golf Training is a premier golf training facility located at Pinetree Country Club in Kennesaw, GA. The facility offers high-level golf instruction through in-person and remote coaching, utilizing the latest technology in golf, including Trackman systems, to help golfers train effectively and make improvements. They provide a straightforward approach to enhancement by focusing on the science behind human movement patterns, offering truthful and accurate information to create clear concepts for golf performance.
why_golfers_like_it: Utilizes advanced Trackman technology for precise ball and club tracking
Offers both in-person and remote coaching options for flexibility
Focuses on data-driven, scientific instruction for clear improvement concepts
Provides free digital downloads and training templates for at-home practice

simulator_hardware.notes: Premium launch monitor used for data-driven coaching

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs?
faq.answer: Players are expected to bring their own golf equipment for lessons and practice sessions.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: There is no mention of food or drink service, and it appears guests may bring their own, though this is not explicitly confirmed.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: 18-hole simulator play time is not specified on the website, as the focus is primarily on training and lessons rather than full rounds.

faq.question: Is this venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Summit Golf Training offers PGA Jr. League programs and summer camps, indicating a commitment to junior golf development.
